'''shanaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacteriologist|mycobacteriologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacteriologist|mycobacteriologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shanaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shænæyæth|shænæyæth]] || [[word:shænæyæj|shænæyæj]] || [[word:shænæyæsh|shænæyæsh]] || [[word:shænæyæ|shænæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shananayath|shananayath]] || [[word:shananayaj|shananayaj]] || [[word:shananayash|shananayash]] || [[word:shananaya|shananaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanayath|shanayath]] || [[word:shanayaj|shanayaj]] || [[word:shanayash|shanayash]] || [[word:shanaya|shanaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanafyath|shanafyath]] || [[word:shanafyaj|shanafyaj]] || [[word:shanafyash|shanafyash]] || [[word:shanafyaf|shanafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shanayatha|shanayatha]] || [[word:shanayaja|shanayaja]] || [[word:shanayasha|shanayasha]] || [[word:shanayaka|shanayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shanayath|shanayath]] || [[word:shanayaj|shanayaj]] || [[word:shanayash|shanayash]] || [[word:shanaya|shanaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shanayathal|shanayathal]] || [[word:shanayajal|shanayajal]] || [[word:shanayashal|shanayashal]] || [[word:shanayakal|shanayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shanayathatha|shanayathatha]] || [[word:shanayajaja|shanayajaja]] || [[word:shanayashasha|shanayashasha]] || [[word:shanayaka|shanayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shanayathan|shanayathan]] || [[word:shanayajan|shanayajan]] || [[word:shanayashan|shanayashan]] || [[word:shanayakan|shanayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shanayathaoro|shanayathaoro]] || [[word:shanayajaoro|shanayajaoro]] || [[word:shanayashaoro|shanayashaoro]] || [[word:shanayakaoro|shanayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
